newsSince: S&P Dow Jones added VIAVI to the S&P MidCap 400 in the June 22 rebalance (announced ~June 12), an index/flow event rather than a fundamental shift. Underlying Q3 FY2026 (April) data-center strength continues: 800G high-volume, 1.6T/CPO ramping. The +8.8% move since June 9 reflects index-inclusion flows plus sustained DC demand.

verdicts.rankRationale: Latent AI-supply-chain lens: VIAVI is the optical/network-test tollbooth on 800G volume and 1.6T/CPO verification, validated by +43% Q3 revenue and DC strength. S&P MidCap 400 add (June 22) is flow not fundamentals, so only +1; thesis intact, hold at 20.
verdicts.bull: Tollbooth on every optical-interconnect upgrade; 800G at volume, 1.6T/CPO ramping; +43% YoY DC-led revenue and broadening TAM.
verdicts.neutral: Index-inclusion flows boosted the tape; fundamentals strong but increasingly well-recognized.
verdicts.bear: +178% YTD and S&P add raise the de-rating risk; telecom recovery still uneven outside data center.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: 1.6T/CPO test ramp and multi-year optical upgrade cycle
verdicts.primaryRisk: Crowding/de-rating after sharp run; telecom softness
